description_long: This object is a rectangular slice of layered cake, featuring alternating layers of golden-yellow sponge and white cream, with a prominent red fruit jam or jelly layer running through the middle. The cake's exterior is coated on one side with a thick, smooth layer of white icing, giving it a clean and finished appearance. The sponge appears moist and airy, with visible crumb structure, while the cream and jam layers are evenly distributed and slightly oozing at the edges. The jam layer is glossy and vibrant, suggesting a strawberry or raspberry flavor. There are no visible decorations, embellishments, or toppings on the cake, and it is not presented on any plate or tray. The overall look is simple and appetizing, with a focus on the classic combination of sponge, cream, and fruit filling.
description: A rectangular slice of layered cake with golden sponge, white cream, and a red jam layer, finished with a smooth white icing on one side. The cake is plain and undecorated, highlighting its classic, appetizing layers.
description_view_0: The cake is viewed from the narrow, iced end, showing the thick white icing and a hint of the layered interior.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the full cross-section of the cake, displaying the alternating sponge, cream, and red jam layers.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end shows the exposed sponge and a thin layer of jam and cream, with no icing visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but with a slightly different angle, emphasizing the jam and cream layers and the plain sponge exterior.
